stemHtml: Following an engine failure, rudder is used to counteract yaw and aileron to bank towards the live engine. For a given airspeed, aeroplane controllability will be better at a...

options.a: low aeroplane mass, due to greater rudder effectiveness because of less sideslip.
options.b: low aeroplane mass, due to greater rudder effectiveness because of greater sideslip.
options.c: high aeroplane mass, due to greater rudder effectiveness because of greater sideslip.
options.d: high aeroplane mass, due to greater rudder effectiveness because of less sideslip
